headline: UBS Keeps Buy Rating on EQT Corporation (EQT)
summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) is one of the 8 Worst Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Now. On July 8, 2026, UBS lowered the firm’s price target on EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) to $73 from $74 previously and kept a Buy rating on the shares. On July 2, Jefferies analyst Lloyd Byrne lowered the firm’s price target on […]

headline: Stephens & Co. Maintains Overweight on EQT, Lowers Price Target to $71
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Mike Scialla   maintains EQT (NYSE:EQT) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $72 to $71.
